title: Classes should avoid having only private constructors
description: Classes should not have only "private" constructorsAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBugdesignWhy is this an issue?How can I fix it?More InfoWhen a class has only aprivateconstructor, it can’t be instantiated except within the class itself. Such classes can be considereddead codeand should be fixedExceptionsClasses that access their private constructors (singletonsorsmart enums) are ignored.Classes with onlystaticmembers are also ignored because they are covered by RuleS1118.Classes that derive fromSafeHandlesince they can be instantiate throughP/Invoke.Available In:Catch issues on the fly,in your IDEDetect issues in your GitHub, Azure DevOps Services, Bitbucket Cloud, GitLab repositoriesAnalyze code in youron-premise CI©2025SonarSource Sàrl.
